## Writeup Details

- **Type**: Machine / Challenge / Sherlock / ProLab / CTF Event
- **Name**: 
- **Category** (if challenge): Web / Crypto / Forensics / Reversing / Pwn / etc.
- **Difficulty**: Easy / Medium / Hard / Insane
- **OS** (if machine): Linux / Windows
- **Retired**: Yes / No

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is for a **retired** machine/challenge only
- [ ] Used the appropriate template from `templates/`
- [ ] Placed in the correct directory
- [ ] Includes all steps (enumeration, exploitation, escalation)
- [ ] Includes command output or screenshots
- [ ] No active machine spoilers
- [ ] Reviewed for accuracy

## Notes

Any additional context about the writeup.
